member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.CommandLineSession
member.summary: A implementation backed by Windows ConPTY (pseudo console). It starts a child process attached to a pseudoconsole and forwards IO between the process and the session .

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.CommandLineSession.PseudoConsole
member.summary: Gets the underlying ConPTY wrapper (process + pipes).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.CommandLineSession.#ctor(VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo)
member.summary: Starts a ConPTY session running the provided command line.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.CommandLineSession.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a ConPTY session running the provided command line.
member.param: Command line to start (for example, cmd.exe or PowerShell).

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.CommandLineSession.#ctor
member.summary: Starts a default ConPTY session using cmd.exe.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsole
member.summary: Wraps a Windows ConPTY pseudo console handle and its associated process and pipes.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsole.Writer
member.summary: Writer stream, that transfer data to child process' STD_INPUT

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsole.Reader
member.summary: Reader stream, that receives data from child process' STD_OUTPUT

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsole.#ctor(System.IntPtr,VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process,System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: Process attached to this pseudo console.
Stream used to write input to the child process.
Stream used to read output from the child process.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsole.Resize(System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Resizes the pseudo console buffer.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsoleFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating ConPTY (CreatePseudoConsole) instances wired to a .

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.PseudoConsoleFactory.Start(VirtualTerminal.Buffer.TerminalScreenBuffer,VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo)
member.summary: Creates a new ConPTY instance for the given buffer size and starts a child process attached to it.
member.param: Terminal buffer (its dimensions are used as the initial console size).
member.returns: A wrapper containing handles, pipes and the child process.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32HandleStream
member.summary: A implementation over a raw Win32 handle (typically a pipe). Used by ConPTY plumbing to expose stdin/stdout pipes as .NET streams.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32HandleStream.#ctor(System.IntPtr,System.IO.FileAccess,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: Whether this stream should close the handle on dispose.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32PipeFactory
member.summary: Creates Win32 pipes used to connect the parent process to a child process (stdin/stdout) for ConPTY scenarios.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32PipeFactory.CreateChildStdInPipe(System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Creates STDIN pipe for child preocess (WE write -> PROCESS reads).
member.param: Handle for the child process to read from.
member.returns: Parent-side stream used to write into child's stdin.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32PipeFactory.CreateChildStdOutPipe(System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Creates STDOUT/STDERR pipe for child process (PROCESS writes -> WE read).
member.param: Handle for the child process to write to.
member.returns: Parent-side stream used to read child's stdout/stderr.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process
member.summary: Small wrapper around a Win32 process handle.

member.name: P:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process.Handle
member.summary: Gets the underlying process handle.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process.#ctor(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Initializes a new wrapper for the specified process handle.
member.exception: Thrown if the handle is invalid.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process.Finalize
member.summary: Uninitializes instance

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32Process.Terminate(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Terminates the process.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo
member.summary: Minimal process creation info used by when starting a process attached to ConPTY.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo.ApplicationName
member.summary: Optional application name passed to CreateProcess.

member.name: F:VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo.CommandLine
member.summary: Optional command line passed to CreateProcess.

member.name: T:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32ProcessFactory
member.summary: Starts a Win32 process, optionally attaching it to a ConPTY pseudo console via extended startup info.

member.name: M:VirtualTerminal.Interop.Win32ProcessFactory.Start(VirtualTerminal.Interop.ProcessCreationInfo,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Starts the process described by and returns a wrapper for its handle.
member.param: ConPTY pseudo console handle, or -1 when not using a pseudo console.
